response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has solid software craftsmanship credentials and broad technical experience spanning roughly 16 years, meeting the minimum tenure requirement, but falls significantly short of the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) profile. The role demands recognized AI expertise, director-level strategic influence, and cloud platform depth; the candidate's AI exposure is limited to six months of agentic tooling work at re:cinq, with no ML background, no cloud architecture credentials, and no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale. An active caregiving gap since October 2025 and the absence of a graduate AI degree further widen the distance from both the minimum and preferred candidate profile.
strengths: ~16 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains — meets the 15-year minimum requirement
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates sustained entrepreneurial initiative and open-source platform ownership, aligning with the preferred startup-within-larger-org profile
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq shows early, practical alignment with agentic AI workflows
concerns: AI expertise is extremely thin — confined to six months at re:cinq with no prior ML/AI track record, publications, or recognized AI products built at scale
No cloud strategy or cloud architecture depth; the role requires advising strategic customers and partners on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption at a director level
No evidence of director-level IC leadership, external thought leadership, conference keynotes, or industry recognition in AI — all hallmarks expected at this seniority

key_factors.factor: No cloud strategy or director-level IC track record
Meets years-of-experience minimum with entrepreneurial history
